## Runtime.RuntimeContext.getJournalsForRecipe() method

Gets all journal records for a recipe (across all versions).

**Signature:**

```typescript
getJournalsForRecipe(recipeId: RecipeId): ReadonlyArray<IJournalRecord>;
```
